docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKAN, MELIS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OKAN, MELIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DURAN, DENIZ $4,343.34 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,503.34 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-23-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MELIS OKAN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT DENIZ DURAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED SHE HAD A FAMILY MEDICAL EMERGENCY AND HAD TO LEAVE THE COUNTRY ABRUPTLY. THE COURT GRANTS A CONTINTUANCE. PLAINTIFF IS TO COMPLETE A ZOOM REQUEST AND SEND THE COURT HER EVEIDANCE IF SHE INTENDS TO APPEAR AT THE NEXT HEARING. DEFENDANT IS GRANTED A ZOOM APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING AND WAS INFORMED TO SEND THE PLAINTIFF HER EVIDENCE BEFORE THE NEXT COURT DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY OKAN, MELIS DURAN, DENIZ
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-25-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gecek Kurukus is present as an authorized representative for Plaintiff/Respondent.

Plaintiff/Respondent is sworn.

Plaintiff /Respondent representative outlines the mornings happenings. The matter was scheduled at 9:00am to Department 525. The matter was then sent for assignment to Dept. 206. Parties were then ordered to report to Dept. 504.

The court called this matter at 9:50am
Deniz Duran Defendant/Appellant is NOT PRESENT

At the close of the hearing, the Court rules as follows:

The Court dismisses the appeal and affirms the judgment.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (504).
